name: 化龍成功＋絕地反殺
name_en: Successful dragon transformation with comeback kill
description: 在所有人認為蛇王必死的情況下，化龍成功歸來，一句反問碾壓反派，將故事高潮推至頂點。

examples.drama_title: 身懷異香的少女被衆人覬覦，怎知每當有男人靠近她一步上古蛇王就吃醋到失控，清除她身邊所有異性只准看他一人！短劇 #甜寵 #先婚後愛 #總裁灰姑娘
examples.excerpt: The emperor has successfully transformed into a dragon. ... Welcome the Dragon King / You seemed to have just said / Who must die today? / How could this be? / Based on your injuries / You absolutely cannot transform into a dragon. / You frog in a well / Of course they wouldn't understand.
